nasb.text: with gentleness correcting those who are in opposition, if perhaps God may grant them repentance leading to the knowledge of the truth,

esv.text: correcting his opponents with gentleness. God may perhaps grant them repentance leading to a knowledge of the truth,

cnv.text: 以溫柔勸導那些對抗的人，或許　神給他們悔改的心，可以認識真理。

ccb.text: 要温柔地规劝那些反对我们的人，也许上帝会赐给他们悔改的心，使他们明白真理，

csbs.text: 温柔地管教那些反对的人；或许神会赐给这些人悔改的心，到真理的知识当中。
